title: Sticky navbar remains usable while scrolling the page
description: Verifies that a visitor can scroll down the page and still see and use the navigation bar as a sticky element throughout.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page until well past the hero section
Scroll further down through additional sections
Click the primary contact call-to-action in the navigation bar
Verify the navigation bar remains visible while scrolling
Verify a contact/let’s-talk intent outcome is displayed (such as a contact section or contact prompt)

title: Smooth scrolling works end-to-end through the page
description: Verifies the user can scroll through the full landing page with smooth, eased scrolling behavior.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll steadily from near the top toward the bottom of the page
Scroll back upward toward the top of the page
Verify the page scrolls smoothly and remains responsive without blocking basic scrolling

title: Hero renders on first load and plays entrance/idle animation
description: Verifies that the hero section appears on initial page load and its motion runs without requiring user interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the initial hero content to finish appearing
Verify the hero section is displayed
Verify hero motion is observable (entrance and/or idle animation occurs)

title: Navbar links can jump/scroll to intended sections without being obscured
description: Verifies that clicking a navbar link brings the user to the corresponding section and the sticky navbar does not overlap/hide the section start.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a navigation link that jumps to a lower section of the page
Scroll slightly up and down near the top of the destination section
Verify the intended destination section is in view after navigation
Verify the destination content is not obscured by the sticky navigation bar

title: User can scroll from hero into lower content smoothly
description: Verifies that a visitor can transition from the hero section into the rest of the page content with normal scrolling interactions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down from the hero section into the next section
Verify additional content below the hero is displayed
Verify scrolling feels continuous without getting stuck at the hero section

title: Logo marquee continuously loops on view
description: Verifies that the logo marquee is visible during browsing and continuously scrolls to communicate credibility at a glance.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until the logo marquee is in view
Wait briefly while watching the marquee
Verify the logo marquee is displayed
Verify the marquee content moves continuously to indicate an infinite loop

title: 3D background reacts to pointer movement and returns to idle
description: Verifies the 3D background responds to mouse movement and returns to an idle state when pointer movement stops.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the page to finish initial rendering
Move the mouse across the viewport
Stop moving the mouse
Verify the 3D background visibly reacts to pointer movement and then settles into an idle motion when the pointer is still

title: Smooth scrolling rest state after scroll stops
description: Verifies that after the user stops scrolling the page settles into a stable rest state without continued unintended movement.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down a moderate amount
Stop scrolling
Verify the page settles and remains stable when scrolling stops

title: Navigation link hover feedback is discoverable
description: Verifies that hovering over navigation links provides interactive feedback that helps a recruiter understand the navbar is interactive.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Move the pointer over one navigation link
Move the pointer away from the navigation link
Verify the navigation link shows a hover feedback state on pointer over and returns to normal when the pointer leaves

title: Marquee hover interaction affects logos and resumes after pointer leave
description: Verifies that hovering over the marquee triggers an interaction effect and that the marquee returns to its continuous motion after the pointer leaves.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until the logo marquee is in view
Move the pointer over the marquee area
Move the pointer away from the marquee area
Verify an interaction effect occurs while hovering over the marquee
Verify the marquee resumes continuous movement after the pointer leaves

title: Hero animations do not replay unexpectedly during minor scrolling
description: Verifies that after the hero has played, minor scroll interactions do not cause the entrance animation to replay in a distracting way.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero entrance animation to complete
Scroll slightly down and then slightly back up to the hero area
Verify the hero content remains stable without re-running the full entrance animation unexpectedly

title: Rapid scroll does not break sticky navigation usability
description: Verifies that fast user scrolling still keeps navigation usable and visible without blocking basic scrolling interactions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll rapidly down the page in several quick gestures
Scroll rapidly back up toward the top
Click the primary contact call-to-action in the navigation bar
Verify basic scrolling remains responsive and not blocked
Verify the primary contact call-to-action remains reachable and clickable

title: 3D background remains stable while scrolling through the page
description: Verifies the 3D background remains visible and stable while the user scrolls through the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down through multiple sections
Scroll back up toward the top of the page
Verify the 3D background remains rendered and does not visibly misalign or disappear during scrolling

title: Smooth scrolling remains responsive during very fast scroll input
description: Verifies fast user scrolling does not cause the page to become unresponsive or visually break while scroll smoothing is active.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll rapidly down the page
Scroll rapidly up the page
Verify the page remains responsive and scrolling remains functional during rapid scroll interactions

title: Smooth scrolling continues working after viewport resize mid-scroll
description: Verifies scroll smoothing continues to work after resizing the viewport while partway down the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down to a mid-page position
Resize the viewport to a narrower width
Continue scrolling down
Verify smooth scrolling continues to function correctly after resizing mid-scroll

title: Rapid pointer enter/leave on marquee does not leave it stuck
description: Verifies that quickly moving the pointer in and out of the marquee does not permanently pause or visually break the marquee animation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until the logo marquee is in view
Move the pointer onto the marquee area and off of it repeatedly
Wait briefly to observe post-interaction behavior
Verify the marquee remains displayed without visual breakage
Verify the marquee continues moving after the rapid pointer interactions

title: 3D background adapts to viewport resize
description: Verifies the 3D background remains usable and visually present after resizing the viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the viewport to a narrower width
Resize the viewport back to a wider width
Verify the 3D background remains visible and appropriately sized after the viewport size changes

title: 3D background handles rapid pointer enter/leave without breaking
description: Verifies the 3D background continues rendering correctly when the pointer rapidly enters and leaves the viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Move the mouse into the viewport
Move the mouse out of the viewport
Repeat moving the mouse in and out of the viewport several times
Verify the 3D background continues to render and animate without freezing or disappearing
